impact: This gives the source freshness recovery path a narrow, commit-safe fixture covering stale guidance, changed hashes, removed pages, and high-priority recrawl selection without live fetch data or raw response bodies.
summary: Adds a deterministic four-record source freshness fixture under PP&D tests.
target_task: Task checkbox-61: Add a minimal source freshness fixture with four records only: one stale guidance page, one changed content hash, one removed page, and one high-priority recrawl candidate, with no live fetch data or raw response bodies.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
